      "question": "What is Artificial Intelligence?",
      "options": ["A) The ability to learn from experience", "B) The ability to reason and solve problems", "C) The ability to think like a human", "D) None of the above"],
      "correct": 0,
      "explanation": "Artificial Intelligence (AI) refers to the development of computer systems capable of performing tasks that typically require human intelligence, such as learning, problem-solving, and decision-making."
